title: weinmannia fagaroides var. trollii
intro: Weinmannia fagaroides var. trollii, also known as Trolle's weinmannia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. This plant is native to New Zealand and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Weinmannia fagaroides var. trollii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which are used to treat a range of conditions, from eczema to acne.
